Skip to contents
adaptiveFTS 0.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Data formatting

format_data()
Convert Data to a data.table Format

Simulation

simulate_far()
Functional Autoregressive process of order 1 (FAR(1)) simulation
simulate_fma()
Functional Moving Average process of order 1 (FMA(1)) simulation
simulate_fBm()
Draw a fractional Brownian motion sample path.
simulate_mfBm()
Draw a multifractional Brownian motion sample path.
hurst_arctan()
Arctan Hurst function
hurst_linear()
Linear Hurst function
hurst_logistic()
Logistic Hurst function

Kernels and smoothing

estimate_nw()
Nadaraya-Watson Kernel Estimator
estimate_nw_bw()
Nadaraya-Watson Bandwidth Selection using Cross-Validation
get_nw_optimal_bw()
Estimate Optimal Bandwidth for Nadaraya-Watson Estimator on a Subset of Curves
biweight()
Biweight kernel function
epanechnikov()
Epanechnikov kernel function
triangular()
Triangular kernel function
tricube()
Tricube kernel function
triweight()
Triweight kernel function
uniform()
Uniform kernel function

Local regularity

estimate_locreg()
Local Regularity Parameters Estimation

Mean function

estimate_mean()
Estimate Mean Function
estimate_mean_risk()
Estimate the Risk Function of the Mean Function
estimate_mean_rp()
Estimate mean function using Rubín and Panaretos (2020) method.
estimate_mean_bw_rp()
Bandwidth estimation using cross-validation for the Rubín and Panaretos (2020) mean function estimator.

Autocovariance function

estimate_autocov()
Estimate the Covariance or Autocovariance Function
estimate_autocov_risk()
Estimate the Risk of the Covariance or Autocovariance Function
estimate_autocov_rp()
Estimate lag-\(\ell\) (\(\ell \leq 0\)) autocovariance function using Rubín and Panaretos (2020) method
estimate_autocov_bw_rp()
Bandwidth estimation using cross-validation for the Rubín and Panaretos (2020) autocovariance function estimator.

Covariance segment

estimate_cov_segment()
Estimate Covariance Segment Function for Functional Data
estimate_cov_segment_risk()
Estimate the Risk of the Covariance Segment Function

Constants and empirical moments

estimate_sigma()
Estimate the the standard deviation of the observation error
estimate_empirical_autocov()
Estimate Empirical Autocovariance Function
estimate_empirical_mom()
Estimate empirical \(p\)-th order moment of \(X(t)\).
estimate_empirical_XsXt_autocov()
Estimate Empirical \(X_0(s)X_{\ell}(t)\) Autocovariance Function for \(\ell\) = 0, 1, ...

Prediction (BLUP)

predict_curve()
Curve prediction using the Best Linear Unbiased Predictor (BLUP).

Real-data helpers

get_real_data_mean()
Mean function learned from the voltage curves of the electricity
get_real_data_far_kenel()
FAR kernel learned from the voltage curves of the electricity

Data

data_far
Sample for Functional Autoregressive Process of Order 1

Internal helpers

.Spq_fun()
\(S_{pq}^{(\ell)}\), (\(\ell \leq 0\)) function. See Rubín and Panaretos (2020) Equation (B.7)
.Qpq_fun()
\(Q_{pq}^{(\ell)}\), (\(\ell \leq 0\)) function. See Rubín and Panaretos (2020) Equation (B.7)
.constant_d()
Constant D(x,y) function
.covariance_mfBm()
Covariance matrix of the multi-fractional Brownian Motion
.random_design()
Generate a random design of the place where the observation is made.

On this page

Developed by Hassan Maissoro.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
